title: Shadows of Evidence
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2 has R-), ing7=R+ (ing7 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing2=G+ (ing2 has G+), ing7=G- (ing7 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing2=B- (ing2 has B-), ing7=B+ (ing7 has B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.
